decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, due 2026-06-15 12:00 UTC) was still SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200, title 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872 #shorts', author Voidline). It auto-published on schedule yesterday; state was never updated by YouTube (same silent-publish pattern as 06-13). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. State now fully reconciled: 11/11 Shorts PUBLIC, 0 SCHEDULED.

Not a publish day (Tue 06-16; long-form cadence is Sundays). Next 3 days (Wed 06-17, Thu 06-18, Fri 06-19) calendar is EMPTY — shorts_state.json has nothing scheduled and the whole catalogue is now published with nothing staged behind v1_bonus_briggs (06-15). Next planned content is v4 Roanoke long-form targeted 06-22 (Sun) + v4_hook/v4_answer Shorts 06-22/06-24, but those exist only as a plan in runs/v4-roanoke/SHORTS_PLAN.md — NOT rendered, NOT uploaded, NOT in state. v4 production is stalled: script.json WRITTEN, but voice/assets/timeline/render/thumb/shorts all pending, and the Google Flow thumb-gen blocker from 06-13 (submit button disabled) is unresolved. RISK: 06-22 ship target (6 days out) likely to slip; pipeline dry through 06-21 vs the 2-Shorts/wk cold-start cadence. ACTION NEEDED: unblock Flow thumb (fresh session / cookie refresh, or fall back to v3 Tunguska AI base placeholder per 06-13 backup plan) and start v4 render pipeline.
